name: Katsudon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat some oil over medium heat.
2. Season the pork cutlets with salt and pepper on both sides.
3. Carefully lower the cutlets into the hot oil and fry until browned on the first side (about 3-4 minutes).
4. Flip the cutlets and fry until browned on the second side (about 3-4 minutes more).
5. Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside.
6. In the same skillet, add a little more oil if needed, and fry a beaten egg over medium heat until just set.
7. Place the fried pork cutlets onto serving bowls of hot cooked rice.
8. Pour the fried egg over the top of each bowl.
9. Serve immediately with your choice of dipping sauce on the side.
